title: Trondheim Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Trondheim, with a Z-Score of -3.14. This event has a Score of 10.0/10, classified as CRITICAL.
body:
The current weather conditions in Trondheim are extreme, with a high level of severity. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 12.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 70% and the wind speed is 21.6 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
